violations.text: REFUSE, recyclables, and returnables shall be removed from the PREMISES at a frequency that will minimize the development of objectionable odors and other conditions that attract or harbor insects and rodents. A large accumulation of refuse/cardboard was observed overflowing in the dumpster area. Establishment to increase pick up frequency. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items. An accumulation of debris was observed surrounding and under the refuse area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
